faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.contactPrefix: Still have questions? Email us at

items.question: What is a QR menu?
items.answer: It's a digital menu your customers open by scanning a QR code with their phone camera.

items.question: How do QR menus work for restaurants?
items.answer: You publish your menu once, place the QR code in your business, and customers open it in their browser. If you make changes, the QR stays the same.

items.question: How do I create a QR code for my restaurant menu?
items.answer: First publish your menu, then download the QR code from Biztro. You can print it and use it on tables, counters, or promotional materials.

items.question: Can I update the menu without reprinting the QR code?
items.answer: Yes. You can change products, prices, or descriptions anytime and the same QR code will keep working.

items.question: Do my customers need an app to open the menu?
items.answer: No. They only need to open their phone camera and scan the QR code. The menu opens in the browser, like any web page.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits your business
pricing.subtitle: Start free. When you need more products, menus, and support, upgrade to Pro.

free.name: Free
free.description: Publish your first digital menu at no cost.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: More capacity and tools for businesses with multiple menus or higher traffic.

setup.title: Set up your business
setup.content: Add your business name, hours, and social links. Biztro organizes the information for you.

products.title: Add your products
products.content: Add products with description, price, and image to get your menu ready in minutes.

publish.title: Customize and publish
publish.content: Adjust the design in the editor, publish your menu, and share it with a link or QR code.

qr.title: Share your menu with a QR code and link
qr.p1: Download your QR code from the editor in seconds. Then print it and place it on tables, counters, or storefronts.
qr.p2: Your customers only need to scan it with their phone camera to open your menu instantly.
qr.p2Highlight: You can also share the same link on social media
qr.p3: The menu adapts to phones and tablets, reads clearly, and requires no app install.

aiFeatures.title: Your menu, ready in less time.
aiFeatures.tagline: Upload a photo or PDF and let AI convert your menu into editable content so you can focus on serving customers.

digitize.title: Digitize your menu in seconds
digitize.description: Upload a PDF or photo of your printed menu and AI detects dishes, prices, and descriptions to turn them into editable content.

translate.title: Translation for every customer
translate.description: Translate your menu into multiple languages so every guest understands what you offer and feels well served.

bento.title: Forget outdated PDFs.
bento.tagline: Edit prices, photos, and categories from the browser, and your changes publish instantly.

brand.name: On-brand design
brand.description: Start with a template and adjust colors, images, and labels like allergens so your menu looks like your business.

editor.name: Easy-to-use editor
editor.description: Edit sections, products, and prices in a visual editor. No technical experience needed to get your menu ready.

qr.name: QR and shareable link
qr.description: Customers can open your menu from their phone by scanning the code or visiting a link—no app required.
